message:
fix: invalidate blocked-IDs cache on issue deletion

DeleteIssue, DeleteIssues, and DeleteIssuesBySourceRepo were not
invalidating the blocked-IDs cache after committing. This could cause
stale bd-ready/bd-blocked results after deleting issues that participate
in dependency edges.

Co-Authored-By: iliev01 <31753916+iliev01@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
